reviews.comment:
Siempre un excelente lugar para descansar y seguir ruta a Bs As, pero nulas medidas por covid-19, 0 de distanciamiento y fui en  diciembre 2020, ni me quiero imaginar ahora! 🤦🏻‍♂️

(Translated by Google)
Always a great place to rest before continuing on to Buenos Aires, but there were absolutely no COVID-19 measures in place, zero social distancing, and I went in December 2020, I don't even want to imagine what it's like now! 🤦🏻‍♂️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c1BtdmFREAE

reviews.comment:

Spotless bathrooms, several hot water dispensers, everything very clean.

reviews.comment:
Exceden la cantidad de gente dentro del local, no hay alcohol en gel. No limpian las.mesas .  NADA de protocolo COVID !!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They're exceeding the number of people inside the establishment, there's no hand sanitizer, they don't clean the tables, and there's NO COVID protocol!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MExYMEZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es lo más parar y  tomarte un descanso en este parador. Hay de todo. Podes comprar algo para tomar y comer ,ir al baño. Hay juegos para los chicos afuera. Hay un lugar para relajarse al aire libre. Es un poco caro..pero el lugar está muy bien ubicado y vale la pena parar y descansar. Antes de seguir el viajé. Lo s baños muy buena higiene. No dejan entrar con las mascotas a la cafetería adentro. Pero hay un lugar afuera con mesas y sillas para tomar tus meriendas. La nafta es más cara.

(Translated by Google)
It's great to stop and take a break at this rest stop. They have everything you need. You can buy something to drink and eat, use the restroom, and there's a playground for kids outside. There's also a place to relax outdoors. It's a bit pricey, but the location is excellent and it's worth stopping and resting before continuing your trip. The restrooms are very clean. They don't allow pets in the cafe inside, but there's an outdoor area with tables and chairs where you can have a snack. Gas is more expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d0xIZDVBRRAB
